title: Only ~1-2% of internalized LNP-siRNA cargo escapes into the cytosol

context.assay: quantitative image-based analysis of LNP-mediated siRNA intracellular trafficking and endosomal escape

title: AAV has a genome packaging limit of ~4.7 kb
Fourth-generation eVLPs achieve up to ~95% base editing in cultured cells

context.assay: base editing efficiency of fourth-generation engineered virus-like particles in cultured cells

title: Anti-CD117-targeted LNP at high dose (~20 ug mRNA) transfects ~90% of HSPCs and LT-HSCs

context.assay: reporter/Cre mRNA delivery to HSPCs and LT-HSCs via anti-CD117-targeted LNP, in vivo
context.condition: single IV dose, ~20 ug mRNA (high dose)

schema_fit.constraint: The chapter explicitly cautions that the ~90% figure is reporter/cargo delivery at high dose, not durable editing efficiency, but the quantity leaf has no field to encode that this measured endpoint differs from the clinically relevant one.
schema_fit.current_ir_behavior: The caveat can only be appended as free text inside title/context, not as a structured, queryable field distinguishing delivery-endpoint type from editing-endpoint type.
schema_fit.candidate_resolution: Add an endpoint_type or validity_caveat field to the quantity leaf (e.g. 'reporter_delivery' vs 'durable_editing') so measurement-type mismatches are queryable rather than buried in prose.
schema_fit.purity_cost: Downstream consumers filtering by value/unit alone could conflate this delivery-efficiency figure with a true durable-editing-efficiency claim, overstating correction rates.

title: NTLA-2001 produces ~50%+ serum TTR knockdown from a single infusion

context.assay: serum transthyretin (TTR) knockdown following in vivo hepatic CRISPR editing (NTLA-2001)

title: A representative mRNA-LNP formulation uses an ionizable:DSPC:cholesterol:PEG-lipid molar ratio of ~50:10:38.5:1.5

context.condition: representative four-component mRNA-LNP formulation; molar ratio ionizable:DSPC:cholesterol:PEG-lipid ≈ 50:10:38.5:1.5

schema_fit.constraint: The load-bearing fact is the joint four-component molar ratio (ionizable:DSPC:cholesterol:PEG ≈ 50:10:38.5:1.5), but the quantity leaf carries exactly one scalar value+unit.
schema_fit.current_ir_behavior: Only the PEG-lipid figure (1.5 mol%) survives as a structured value; the other three ratio terms are demoted to unstructured text in context/title.
schema_fit.candidate_resolution: A composite/vector-valued quantity leaf kind (a list of named value+unit pairs) or a dedicated ratio/composition leaf type.
schema_fit.purity_cost: A query over structured quantities cannot reconstruct or validate the full formulation ratio from this entry alone, only the isolated PEG-lipid figure.

title: SORT: a fifth charged lipid systematically redirects LNP biodistribution among liver, lung, and spleen

leaf.data: Adding a fifth, charged 'SORT' lipid to the four-component LNP formulation shifts biodistribution in a charge-dependent way: a permanently cationic lipid (e.g., DOTAP) redirects delivery to lung, an anionic lipid (e.g., 18PA) redirects delivery to spleen, and an ionizable-only formulation stays in liver; the effect holds for mRNA, Cas9 mRNA/sgRNA, and Cas9 ribonucleoprotein cargo.
leaf.warrant: Net particle surface charge determines which serum opsonins adsorb and form the protein corona, and that corona composition dictates which organ-specific receptor/uptake pathway captures the particle, so tuning one physicochemical parameter (charge) is sufficient to reassign organ tropism without any targeting ligand.

schema_fit.constraint: The finding is a three-way categorical mapping (cationic→lung, anionic→spleen, neutral/ionizable-only→liver), but the proposition leaf holds exactly one data string and one warrant string.
schema_fit.current_ir_behavior: All three formulation-outcome branches are flattened into one prose 'data' field.
schema_fit.candidate_resolution: Represent as a structured list of (formulation-perturbation, organ-outcome) tuples under one proposition, or as three linked propositions sharing a common warrant.
schema_fit.purity_cost: A query for 'what does an anionic SORT lipid do' cannot isolate the spleen-specific sub-claim without parsing prose, and the one-to-one perturbation-outcome correspondence is not machine-checkable.

title: Ionizable lipids are pH-switched: neutral in circulation, cationic and membrane-disrupting in the acidifying endosome

leaf.data: Ionizable lipids are engineered to be near-neutral at physiological pH, reducing toxicity and opsonization in circulation, but to protonate in the acidifying endosome (~pH 6-6.5), where the resulting cationic charge disrupts the endosomal membrane and forces a fraction of the cargo into the cytosol.
leaf.warrant: A charge state that switches with pH lets the particle stay inert in blood and become membrane-disruptive only once inside the acidifying endosome, so the lipid's protonation behavior (pKa) is the tunable variable converting a generic endocytic uptake event into cytosolic cargo release.
leaf.rebuttal: Even the most advanced clinical ionizable lipids (SM-102, ALC-0315) remain in the low-single-digit-percent escape regime, so pH-triggered protonation alone has not been sufficient to raise escape efficiency much beyond the ~1-2% ceiling.

title: Narrative: the program is cheap, the address is the moat (2025-2026 delivery-platform M&A)
Narrative: ex vivo vs in vivo delivery as the trade space that decides COGS
